slots: Buddhist monument, social history, architectural landmark
Begin your journey at one of the world's most important Buddhist sites, where Dr. B. R. Ambedkar embraced Buddhism along with thousands of followers in 1956.
Geographical landmark, colonial heritage, city icon
Visit the historic marker considered the geographical centre of colonial India and learn about its significance in the country's mapping history.
Waterfront promenade, illuminated fountains, sunset views
Relax by one of Nagpur's most popular lakes, where scenic views and vibrant evening activities create the perfect end to the day.
Travel to the historic town of Ramtek, believed to have been visited by Lord Rama during his exile. Enjoy breathtaking views from the temple complex atop the hill.
Spend the afternoon amidst tranquil surroundings, enjoying water-based activities and picturesque views of the surrounding hills.
Experience serenity at this beautifully designed Buddhist temple known for its peaceful surroundings and spiritual ambience.
Wildlife safari, tiger habitat, forest landscapes
Embark on an exciting safari through one of Central India's premier wildlife destinations, home to tigers, leopards, deer, and diverse birdlife.
Deepen your understanding of the region's rich ecosystem through guided nature experiences and scenic forest trails.
Conclude your Nagpur journey by exploring the city's famous orange markets and discovering why it is known as the "Orange City" of India.
